It does call doPost method
doGet(HttpServletRequest, HttpServletResponse) - Method in class com.sunilos.p4.ctl.BaseReportCtl
Handles GET requests by fetching the data list, determining the requested output format from the type parameter (defaults to "pdf"), and delegating to BaseReportCtl.generateReport(jakarta.servlet.http.HttpServletResponse, java.util.List<B>, java.lang.String, java.lang.String).
doGet(HttpServletRequest, HttpServletResponse) - Method in class com.sunilos.p4.ctl.HelloServlet

Contains submit logics
doPost(HttpServletRequest, HttpServletResponse) - Method in class com.sunilos.p4.ctl.BaseListCtl
It contains search and pagination operations os a list page.
doPost(HttpServletRequest, HttpServletResponse) - Method in class com.sunilos.p4.ctl.BaseReportCtl
Delegates POST requests to BaseReportCtl.doGet(jakarta.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest, jakarta.servlet.http.HttpServletResponse), so the report can be triggered from either a link or a form submission.
doPost(HttpServletRequest, HttpServletResponse) - Method in class com.sunilos.p4.ctl.ChangePasswordCtl
